name: The Margin
description: Clean modern editorial magazine. Instrument Serif + Inter, drop-cap long reads, dark mode toggle, reading-progress bar, category archive, legal pages.

primary.title: Primary nav
primary.description: Top navigation rendered to the right of the masthead

legal.title: Legal nav
legal.description: Privacy / Terms / Cookie links shown below the footer

sidebar.title: Sidebar widgets
sidebar.description: Right-hand widget stack on category, tag, and archive routes

issue_label.title: Issue label
issue_label.description: Small label above the masthead title (e.g. Issue No. 47).

masthead_title.title: Masthead headline
masthead_title.description: The large editorial headline on the home page.

masthead_lede.title: Masthead lede
masthead_lede.description: Short paragraph beneath the masthead headline.
masthead_lede.default: A magazine for the things that don't fit in a feed.

archive_cta_eyebrow.title: Archive CTA eyebrow
archive_cta_eyebrow.description: Eyebrow above the bottom category strip.

archive_cta_title.title: Archive CTA title
archive_cta_title.description: Heading above the bottom category strip.

cover-story.title: Cover Story
cover-story.description: Primary story shown as the large home-page feature.

hero-rail.title: Hero Rail
hero-rail.description: Secondary stories shown beside the cover story.

latest-grid.title: Latest Grid
latest-grid.description: Curated story grid shown below the hero area.
